\begin{circuitikz}
    
    % Place logic gates
    \draw (0,0)             node[and port, number inputs=2](and1){}
    ([yshift=-2cm] and1)    node[and port, number inputs=2](and2){}
    ([xshift=2.5cm] $(and1)!0.5!(and2)$)
                            node[or port, number inputs=2](or1){}
    (and2.in 1)             node[not port, anchor=out](not1){}
    ([yshift=-2cm] or1.out) node[not port, anchor=in](not2){}

    % Internal connections
    (not1.in)               to[short] (\tikztostart |- and1.in 2)
                            coordinate(j1)
                            to[short] (and1.in 2)
    (and1.out)              to[short] (\tikztostart -| or1.in 1)
                            to[short] (or1.in 1)
    (and2.out)              to[short] (\tikztostart -| or1.in 2)
                            to[short] (or1.in 2)
    (and2.in 2)             to[short] (\tikztostart |- not2.in)
                            to[short] (not2.in) 
                            to[short, *-] (or1.out)

    % Inputs
    ($(not1.in)!0.5!(j1)$)  to[short, *-] ++(-0.5,0)
                            coordinate(en)
                            node[left]{$EN$}
    (and1.in 1)             to[short] (\tikztostart -| en)
                            node[left]{$D$}

    % Outputs
    (or1.out)               to[short, *-] (\tikztostart -| not2.out)
                            node[right]{$Q$}
    (not2.out)              node[right]{$\overline{Q}$}

    ;

\end{circuitikz}
